items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for a mini booking interface within Instagram/Facebook. However, the evidence does not include any direct confirmation of the existence or functionality of such an interface. The linked use case describes the need for this feature, but without concrete evidence of its implementation, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
